7 #include "EventCalendar.h"
8 /* Author : desrozis at Wed Oct 29 09:34:33 2014

11 
12 #include "ArcGeoSim/Time/IEvent.h"
13 
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Utils/OutputFormatting/OutputFormatting.h"
15 
16 #include <arcane/ISubDomain.h>
17 
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 
20 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
21 EventCalendar(Arcane::ISubDomain* sd)
22  : Arcane::TraceAccessor(sd->traceMng())
23  , TimeVariables(sd)
24  , m_verbose(false)
25  , m_observers(this)
26  , m_observable(NULL) {}
27 
28 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
29 
30 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
31 ~EventCalendar()
32 {
33  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < m_ownership_events.size(); ++i)
34  delete m_ownership_events[i];
35 }
36 
37 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
38 
39 void
40 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
41 schedule(IEvent* event, Ownership::ePolicy owner)
42 {
43  attachObserver(event);
44 
45  if(owner == Ownership::Take)
46  m_ownership_events.add(event);
47 }
48 
49 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
50 
51 Arcane::Real
52 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
53 nextEventTime()
54 {
55  Arcane::Real event_time = m_final_time();
56 
57  TimeStep::ObserverSet::iterator it = m_observers.begin();
58 
59  for(; it != m_observers.end(); ++it) {
60  const IEvent* e = static_cast<IEvent*>(*it);
61  if ((e->startDate() - m_time()) > std::numeric_limits<Arcane::Real>::epsilon())
62  event_time = Arcane::math::min(event_time, e->startDate());
63  if ((e->endDate() - m_time()) > std::numeric_limits<Arcane::Real>::epsilon())
64  event_time = Arcane::math::min(event_time, e->endDate());
65  }
66 
67  if(m_verbose) {
68 
69  const Arcane::Integer size = m_observers.size();
70 
71  using namespace OutputFormatting;
72  OutputFormatting::Array out("|r:l|");
73 
74  out << hline('-') << endl()
75  << multicolumn(2,'c') << "Event time" << endl()
76  << hline('-') << endl();
77  if(size == 0) {
78  out << multicolumn(2,'c') << "No event planned" << endl()
79  << hline('-') << endl();
80  } else {
81  out << multicolumn(2,'c') << size << " event(s) planned" << endl()
82  << hline('-') << endl();
83  out << "next event time" << sep() << event_time << endl()
84  << hline('-') << endl();
85  }
86  info() << out;
87 
88  }
89 
90  return event_time;
91 }
92 
93 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
94 
95 void
96 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
97 print() const
98 {
99  const Arcane::Integer size = m_observers.size();
100 
101  using namespace OutputFormatting;
102  OutputFormatting::Array out("|r:l|");
103 
104  out << hline('-') << endl()
105  << multicolumn(2,'c') << "Event time" << endl()
106  << hline('-') << endl();
107  if(size == 0) {
108  out << multicolumn(2,'c') << "No event planned" << endl()
109  << hline('-') << endl();
110  } else {
111  out << multicolumn(2,'c') << size << " event(s) planned" << endl()
112  << hline('-') << endl();
113  out << "min" << sep() << "max" << endl()
114  << minTime() << sep() << maxTime() << endl()
115  << hline('-') << endl();
116  out << multicolumn(2,'c') << "Time of event(s)" << endl();
117  out << "start" << sep() << "end" << endl();
118  TimeStep::ObserverSet::const_iterator it = m_observers.begin();
119  for(; it != m_observers.end(); ++it) {
120  const IEvent* e = static_cast<IEvent*>(*it);
121  if(e->startDate() == e->endDate()) {
122  out << e->startDate() << sep() << "xxx" << endl();
123  } else {
124  out << e->startDate() << sep() << e->endDate() << endl();
125  }
126  }
127  out << hline('-') << endl();
128  }
129  info() << out;
130 }
131 
132 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
133 
134 void
135 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
136 execute(const TimeStep::EntryPoint& entry_point)
137 {
138  if(entry_point == TimeStep::Begin())
139  fatal() << "ArcGeoSim::TimeStep::Begin enty points shouldn't be notify by user";
140  if(entry_point == TimeStep::End())
141  fatal() << "ArcGeoSim::TimeStep::End enty points shouldn't be notify by user";
142  if(entry_point == TimeStep::BeforeRestoreSave())
143  fatal() << "ArcGeoSim::TimeStep::BeforeRestoreSave enty points shouldn't be notify by user";
144 
145  m_observers.notifyObservers(entry_point);
146 }
147 
148 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
149 
150 void
151 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
152 notify(const TimeStep::EntryPoint& entry_point)
153 {
154  m_observers.notifyObservers(entry_point);
155 }
156 
157 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
158 
159 void
160 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
161 notify(eTimeStepState state)
162 {
163  m_observers.notifyObservers(state);
164 }
165 
166 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
167 
168 Arcane::Real
169 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
170 minTime() const
171 {
172  TimeStep::ObserverSet::const_iterator it = m_observers.begin();
173 
174  Arcane::Real min_date = Arcane::FloatInfo<Arcane::Real>::maxValue();
175  for(; it != m_observers.end(); ++it) {
176  const IEvent* e = static_cast<IEvent*>(*it);
177  min_date = Arcane::math::min(min_date, e->startDate());
178  min_date = Arcane::math::min(min_date, e->endDate());
179  }
180 
181  return min_date;
182 }
183 
184 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
185 
186 Arcane::Real
187 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
188 maxTime() const
189 {
190  TimeStep::ObserverSet::const_iterator it = m_observers.begin();
191 
192  Arcane::Real max_date = - Arcane::FloatInfo<Arcane::Real>::maxValue();
193  for(; it != m_observers.end(); ++it) {
194  const IEvent* e = static_cast<IEvent*>(*it);
195  max_date = Arcane::math::max(max_date, e->startDate());
196  max_date = Arcane::math::max(max_date, e->endDate());
197  }
198 
199  return max_date;
200 }
201 
202 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
203 
204 void
205 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
206 attachObservable(IObservable* observable)
207 {
208  ARCANE_ASSERT((observable != NULL),("IObservable pointer null"));
209 
210  m_observable = observable;
211 }
212 
213 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
214 
215 void
216 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
217 attachObserver(TimeStep::IObserver* observer)
218 {
219  m_observers.attachObserver(observer);
220 }
221 
222 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
223 
224 void
225 ArcGeoSim::EventCalendar::
226 detachObserver(TimeStep::IObserver* observer)
227 {
228  m_observers.detachObserver(observer);
229 }
